user.title: Dihor Dashboard Background
user.description: Choose the dashboard and background source.

static.title: Static file background
static.description: Use an existing image file from your Home Assistant configuration directory.

api.title: API background
api.description: Download the background from an image URL and refresh it on a schedule.

unsplash.title: Unsplash background
unsplash.description: Download a random Unsplash image and expose it through a stable local URL.
